entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop being studied for storage quality

entities.description: The groundnut bruchid, a storage pest that causes serious losses

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A toxigenic fungal inoculum used to test storage quality

entities.name: TRIPLE-LAYER HERMETIC STORAGE BAGS
entities.description: Storage bags designed to create low oxygen and high carbon dioxide environments to prevent pest infestation

entities.name: POLYPROPYLENE BAGS
entities.description: Traditionally used storage bags for groundnuts

entities.name: JUTE BAGS
entities.description: Traditionally used storage bags for groundnuts

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The level of moisture in groundnut pods, which influences pest and fungal activity

entities.name: HYPOXIA
entities.description: Low oxygen condition created within hermetic storage bags

entities.name: HYPERCARBIA
entities.description: High carbon dioxide condition created within hermetic storage bags

entities.name: GERMINATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A measure of the viability of groundnut pods after storage

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: A biochemical constituent of groundnut pods

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A biochemical constituent of groundnut pods

entities.name: POD WEIGHT
entities.description: The physical weight of groundnut pods

entities.name: INFESTATION
entities.description: The invasion of groundnut kernels by insects, pests, and fungi
